languages.text: "Не может быть! Он левитирует только потому что ему лень ходить?"
"You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"
languages.original_text: "Не может быть! Он левитирует только потому что ему лень ходить?"

traits.locale_text: "You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"
"You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"
"You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"

languages.text: «¡No me diga! ¿Siempre levita a todas partes porque le da pereza caminar?».
languages.original_text: "You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"

traits.locale_text: «¡No me diga! ¿Siempre levita a todas partes porque le da pereza caminar?».

languages.text: “不会吧！他总飘着，竟是因为懒得走路？”
languages.original_text: "You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"

traits.locale_text: “不会吧！他总飘着，竟是因为懒得走路？”

languages.text: « Vraiment ? Il lévite uniquement parce qu'il est trop fainéant pour marcher ? »
languages.original_text: "You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"

traits.locale_text: « Vraiment ? Il lévite uniquement parce qu'il est trop fainéant pour marcher ? »

languages.text: "Hadi canım! Yürümeye üşendiği için mi havada süzülüyor?"
languages.original_text: "You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"

traits.locale_text: "Hadi canım! Yürümeye üşendiği için mi havada süzülüyor?"

languages.text: 「まさか！ 彼が宙に浮いているのは、歩くのが面倒なだけだというのか？」
languages.original_text: "You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"

traits.locale_text: 「まさか！ 彼が宙に浮いているのは、歩くのが面倒なだけだというのか？」

languages.text: "Was Ihr nicht sagt! Er schwebt nur, weil er zu faul zum Laufen ist?"
languages.original_text: "You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"

traits.locale_text: "Was Ihr nicht sagt! Er schwebt nur, weil er zu faul zum Laufen ist?"
